decision: Admin DB inspection console: read-first, SQLi-safe, super-admin gated. Identifier safety ported from dbadmin.go: table/column names validated against information_schema catalog (rejected if absent) then quoted (quoteIdent = pgx.Identifier.Sanitize equiv); values always bound as $N::catalog-type. Pure lib (lib/db-console/identifiers.ts + query-builder.ts) is unit-tested with adversarial names; impure layer (console.ts) loads the catalog + runs queries.
rationale: Ports reference-platform mechanism verbatim now that daax is on Postgres (docs §3 F6, D4).

decision: Super-admin gate is an ENV allow-list (DAAX_SUPERADMIN_USERS), layered ON TOP of requireRole via requireSuperAdmin(). Disjoint from user_roles so a normal admin cannot self-escalate by editing the RBAC tables the console exposes. Host-dev local-operator bypass treated as super-admin (root of the machine), matching resolveAccess. reuses lib/rbac/allowlist matching.
rationale: Anti-escalation property from dbadmin.go: super-admin membership must not be a DB row the console can edit.

decision: Writes opt-in behind DAAX_DB_CONSOLE_WRITES (off by default, checked in POST after the guard). executeWrite performs the mutation AND a forced auth_audit row in ONE transaction; audit-insert failure rolls the write back. UI (Data tab in provenance admin) is read-only; writes are API-only.
rationale: D4: read-first, audited writes behind a flag; raw CRUD must not bypass app-code auditing.

decision: Extended scripts/auth-audit-lib.ts to recognise requireSuperAdmin as a guard AND made AUTH_GUARD_IMPORT_RE handle multi-line named imports ([^;] instead of .). Added tests/integration/setup.ts (server-only mock) + setupFiles to vitest.integration.config.ts so server-only DB-console modules import under the node-env integration suite.
validation: typecheck+lint+audit:auth+unit(1695)+integration(real PG)+build all pass; producer Claude Opus 4.8, validator pending cross-provider.
